section_subtitle: Zero-trust AI infrastructure purpose-built for Africa's regulated industries.
pending_strip: In development — register interest via our contact page.

cards.title: Corporate AI Automation
cards.description: Agentic automation for enterprise workflows, engineered zero-trust.

detail.heading: Corporate AI Automation
paragraphs: We build autonomous multi-agent systems that execute enterprise workflows end-to-end, with human oversight gates on every high-risk action.
Each deployment is bounded by zero-trust controls: least-privilege tool access, cryptographic audit trails, and sandboxed execution environments that prevent lateral movement.
bullets: Agentic task orchestration with human-in-the-loop approval gates
Least-privilege tool access and sandboxed execution
Cryptographic audit trail for every agent action
Designed to help organisations meet data-handling obligations

cards.title: Training & Certifications
cards.description: Corporate + university tracks, incl. CBN/NDPA migration syllabus.

detail.heading: Training & Certifications
paragraphs: Structured programmes for teams adopting agentic AI and zero-trust engineering practices, delivered in corporate and institutional formats.
Curricula cover architecture, deployment, and governance — including migration planning for data-localisation requirements.
bullets: Corporate upskilling in agentic AI and zero-trust engineering
University-track curricula delivered with partner institutions
Migration-planning syllabus for data-localisation readiness
Certificates issued by AiRevl or with partner institutions

cards.title: Sovereign Compliance Suite
cards.description: Edge isolation · regulatory telemetry · UBO/AML · 72-hr breach response.

detail.heading: Sovereign Compliance Suite
paragraphs: A composable set of infrastructure modules engineered to help regulated organisations work toward their data-protection and financial-regulatory obligations.
Each module operates independently or as part of a unified perimeter — deployed on-premise or at the edge, never dependent on a single cloud jurisdiction.
bullets: Hybrid Edge Isolation — workloads execute within a sovereign perimeter, keeping sensitive data inside jurisdictional boundaries
Regulatory Telemetry — continuous posture monitoring with structured audit outputs for internal review
UBO/AML Investigator — entity-resolution tooling that surfaces beneficial-ownership chains for compliance teams
72-Hour Breach Response — automated triage, evidence packaging, and notification drafting within the statutory window

cards.title: AiRevl Research Desk (RaaS)
cards.description: Evidence-grade research on demand: due diligence, literature scans, regulatory briefs.

detail.heading: AiRevl Research Desk (RaaS)
paragraphs: On-demand research delivered as structured, citation-backed outputs — due-diligence reports, literature reviews, and regulatory-landscape briefs.
Every output is generated by multi-agent pipelines with source verification steps, then reviewed before delivery.
bullets: Due-diligence and entity research with citation trails
Literature scans across academic, regulatory, and industry sources
Regulatory-landscape briefs tailored to specific jurisdictions
Human review gate before every deliverable

cards.title: Agent Foundry (MAaaS)
cards.description: Custom agents and multi-agent systems, evaluated under LLM-as-a-Judge, delivered with governance rails.

detail.heading: Agent Foundry (MAaaS)
paragraphs: We design, build, and evaluate custom agents and multi-agent systems for your specific operational context.
Every agent ships with governance rails: structured evaluation under LLM-as-a-Judge, injection screening, output validation, and human escalation paths.
bullets: Custom agent design for domain-specific workflows
Multi-agent orchestration with delegation and escalation
LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation pipelines for quality assurance
Injection screening and output validation built in
